---
title: "Overview"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn, resolve_quarter
from thirteen_f._legacy_dashboard.charts import change_waterfall, consensus_heatmap

conn = get_conn()
period = resolve_quarter(conn)  # THIRTEEN_F_QUARTER 환경변수 사용
```

# Consensus Heatmap (Top 30)

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd

rows = conn.execute(
    """
    SELECT s.cusip, COALESCE(m.ticker, s.cusip) AS ticker,
           mn.label, s.weight_pct
    FROM signals_quarterly s
    JOIN managers mn ON mn.cik = s.cik
    LEFT JOIN cusip_ticker_map m ON m.cusip = s.cusip
    WHERE s.period_of_report = ? AND s.change_type != 'exit'
    """,
    (period,),
).fetchdf()
matrix = rows.pivot_table(index="ticker", columns="label", values="weight_pct", fill_value=0)
matrix["__sum"] = matrix.sum(axis=1)
matrix = matrix.sort_values("__sum", ascending=False).head(30).drop(columns="__sum")
consensus_heatmap(matrix)
```

# Change Type Distribution

```{python}
#| echo: false
counts = dict(conn.execute(
    "SELECT change_type, COUNT(*) FROM signals_quarterly WHERE period_of_report = ? GROUP BY 1",
    (period,),
).fetchall())
change_waterfall(counts)
```
